features: Fixed SaaS regression where POS cache/offline scripts were gated by global System properties instead of tenant JerrySettings.
Restored business-scoped toggle checks for javascript_tweaks and offline_mode views.
author: Jerry

features: Bumped module asset/version stamp to force client cache refresh for POS tweak scripts.
author: Jerry

features: Recovered speed-cache runtime using master logic while restoring tenant-scoped cache key isolation.
Switched POS speed-cache toggle read to JerrySettings (business-scoped) for SaaS environments.
Updated preload/reload requests to include location_id to prevent wrong product cache population.
author: Jerry

features: Stabilized POS speed cache by reverting to a single cache controller and removing duplicate reload bindings.
Aligned cache key back to tenant key format used across Jerry tweaks.
Updated preload/reload product fetch calls to include location_id for reliable cache population.
author: Jerry

features: Fixed POS speed cache key generation to not depend on offline-mode variables.
Hardened Reload Products action to preserve previous cache if refresh fails.
Updated reload flow to refresh in-memory cache object immediately after successful fetch.
author: Jerry

features: Offline printouts no longer include OFFLINE warning header/footer; receipt now shows only a compact offline reference number.
Offline reference is now attached to POS save payload notes so it is preserved in synced/saved sale records for later lookup.
Reload Products control restored with working click handler and Ultimate-style inline button appearance.
author: Jerry

features: Reduced POS footer height further by flattening Total/Payable label into a single-line Payable label.
Removed stacked Total + Payable text block that was causing double-height footer rows.
Scaled payable amount typography down in footer action area for compact layout.
author: Jerry

features: Reduced POS footer menu height by forcing single-row compact action bar layout.
Switched All Sales button to inline styling to prevent vertical stacking and double-height footer rows.
Bumped module version to refresh cached tweak assets/views.
author: Jerry

features: Renamed client-facing dashboard/menu/module label from JerryUpdate Tweaks to Just Tweaks.
Updated install and update success messages to use Just Tweaks naming.
Renamed master toggle label to 'Run Entire Plugin (Just Tweaks)' for one-click full toggle enablement.
author: Jerry

features: Moved Online/Offline indicator into POS footer action bar with compact inline pill styling.
Moved Reload Products button into POS footer action bar with compact inline button styling.
Reduced control sizing to prevent footer height expansion from improper placement.
author: Jerry

features: Made Reload Products button conditional on POS Speed Cache toggle.
Removed unnecessary reload fallback path when speed cache is disabled.
Kept All Sales control independent from cache state.
author: Jerry

features: Restored visibility of Reload Products and All Sales controls on POS regardless of speed-cache toggle state.
Added fallback reload handler when POS speed cache logic is disabled.
Added robust All Sales fallback rendering when action bar container is unavailable.
author: Jerry

features: Improved POS visibility for Offline/Online status with fixed high-contrast floating pill.
Improved POS Reload Products control with labeled high-contrast floating button.
Moved offline queue panel and status widget to fixed viewport positions to avoid hidden controls.
author: Jerry

features: Changed default jerry_account_hardening to OFF for safer first-time tenant rollout.
Added Admin-only guard for JerryUpdate Tweaks pages/actions (menu + controller access checks).
Added superadmin-only 'Accounting Migration' button to run hardening migration on demand.
author: Jerry

features: Removed remaining blue background styles from home dashboard side navigation in dark mode.
Added explicit Tailwind blue-class overrides for custom aside.side-bar links and states.
Aligned home sidebar hover/focus colors with neutral dark palette.
author: Jerry

features: Converted settings layout to accordion sections while restoring per-toggle descriptions.
Added one-click 'Apply All Tweaks' master toggle in settings UI.
Added backend support so apply-all enables all jerry_* toggles for the current business.
author: Jerry

features: Reorganized all tweak toggles into clear group-wise sections for faster admin control.
Separated settings by functional page areas: Theme/UI, Accounts/Ledger, POS/Sell, POS Layout, Product, and Expense/Contact/Labels/Invoice.
Kept all original toggle keys and behaviors intact while improving ordering and usability.
author: Jerry

features: Fixed navbar/content color split by scoping dark theme overrides to main header only.
Removed over-broad wrapper/content background selectors that caused dashboard background expansion.
Stabilized right layout background handling in dark mode.
author: Jerry

features: Fixed dark theme header mismatch by narrowing navbar theming selectors to main header only.
Removed over-broad nav/header override that caused right layout/navigation color inconsistency.
Unified main header and logo dark background for stable visual continuity.
author: Jerry

features: Renamed client-facing module label to JerryUpdate Tweaks across dashboard, menu, and install/update messages.
Fixed label tweak runtime selectors for barcode labels screen using field names instead of non-existent IDs.
Improved label tweak compatibility with iCheck and plain checkbox rendering.
author: Jerry

features: Enforced strict SaaS scope: jerry_* settings no longer read from global System properties.
Enforced strict SaaS scope: jerry_* settings are not persisted to global System when tenant context is missing.
Aligned JerrySettings behavior with Superadmin multi-business tenancy model.
author: Jerry

features: Added DB compatibility migration to ensure accounts.account_type_id and accounts.account_details exist in legacy databases.
Upgraded Accounts listing query to be schema-aware and avoid SQL 42S22 crashes on mixed-version tenants.
Added Runtime Compatibility Checks section in Technical Status tab for fast schema diagnostics.
Documented and tracked PHP 8 getGrossProfit() signature deprecation fix under Jerry bug fix registry.
author: Jerry

features: Completely refreshed JerryUpdates documentation and tweak matrix in README.
Updated module metadata and dashboard sync stamp for the latest hardening release.
Aligned logbook descriptions with SaaS/business-scoped runtime behavior.
author: Jerry

features: Finalized strict business-level separation for all jerry_* runtime toggles.
Removed install-time global writes/removals of jerry_* keys in System table.
Added tenant defaults in JerrySettings for safe per-business fallback behavior.
Ensured no runtime jerry_* setting path depends on global System values in tenant context.
author: Jerry

features: Added accounting hardening toggle (jerry_account_hardening) to Jerry Updates dashboard.
Registered JerryAccountHardeningListener on payment add/update/delete events.
Added deterministic payment-to-ledger sync protection with stale-row cleanup and duplicate guard.
Extended transaction drill-down links and corrected report filter handling for payment account reports.
Improved running balance determinism for same-timestamp entries using operation_date + id tie-break.
author: Jerry

features: Upgraded POS Offline Engine Row Caching: Added Dynamic Cache Invalidation.
The offline engine cache keys are now automatically salted with an MD5 hash representing the current compact POS layout toggles.
Toggling Cart Row layout settings instantly busts the old cache and forces the pre-warmer to fetch the new HTML structure.
author: Jerry

features: Introduced 'Compact Mode' POS toggles to drastically halve product row height.
Added toggles for Cart Row: Hide Qty Buttons (+/-) and Hide Unit Dropdown.
Added toggles for Suggestion Grid: Hide SKU, Hide Stock Qty.
Decoupled all visibility settings into 6 independent Dashboard controls without Upgrade Safe visual labels.
author: Jerry

features: Introduced manageable core overrides for POS Purchase Price in Cart Row and Suggestion Grid.
Added CSS injection to hide all POS product images for a denser text UI.
Integrated new UI toggles into the dashboard for 'Show POS Purchase Price' and 'Hide POS Product Images'.
author: Jerry

features: Jerry Offline Mode: Online-first hybrid POS with IndexedDB sale queue.
AJAX interceptor catches network failures and auto-queues sales locally.
Auto-sync engine replays queued sales when connectivity returns.
Status pill UI shows online/offline state and pending sync count.
Queue panel with manual sync, individual delete, and clear synced controls.
author: Jerry

features: Recovered Jerry's Full Product Cache Addon from lost pos(3).js backup files.
Rebuilt POS LocalStorage Speed Search engine inside JerryUpdates module (upgrade-safe).
Added dashboard toggle: 'POS Speed Cache' to dynamically enable/disable the feature.
Global codebase scan completed — all forgotten customizations documented via JerryUpdates.

features: Completely rewired all javascript tweaks to the DB UI toggles for explicit user control.
Added 'Product Clean UI Mod' logic to hide Racks, IMEI, Weight, Descriptions on demand.
Added 'Purchase Price Default to Zero' automatic feature mapping.
Added 'Tax Inclusive Default' automatic feature mapping.
Dynamically added a Quick-Add Product Category (+) button directly to the Add Product Screen.
Moved Update Log history to a dedicated tab for better visibility.
Enhanced Expense UI to auto-fill Payment Amount and trigger real-time V12 Balance Due calculations.

features: Performed deep-dive analysis of 'custom_views/' feature set compared to original resources.
Implemented Tabbed UI in Jerry Updates Dashboard for categorized information display.
Added Technical Summary of Custom Enhancements (Grid Dashboard, Simplified Sell, Quick category-adding).

features: Implemented upgrade-safe Proxy Pattern for Ledger Advance Payment calculation.
Moved Dark Mode CSS injection to <head> to eliminate Flash of Unstyled Content (FOUC).
Added System Black Theme Global Enforcer toggle for overriding user UI preferences.
Added custom CSS injected fix to AdminLTE 'skin-black' theme to make header navbar perfectly black.
Restored commented-out native black and light themes from BusinessController.
Added Laravel Cache Methodologies GUI for clearing application caches without CLI.
Extracted and documented Jerry's Ultimate POS Accumulated Knowledge into AI Skills.
Added dynamic Update Log UI driven by changelog.json file.

features: Module Initialized with JerryTransactionUtil proxy foundation.
